failureReasons: content-non-empty: expected >=200 visible chars and >=120px of painted content, observed 5 chars and 876px — "hello"

text-present (names the file under review and paints both sides of the change): missing ["src/server.ts", "const REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000;", "const CACHE_TTL_MS = 30_000;"] from the content root's visible text (5 chars) — "hello"

artifact.source:
<section>
<Heading level="h2">repo/src/server.ts — HEAD~1 vs HEAD</Heading>
<Text variant="muted">Adds structured JSON logging, request timeouts, graceful shutdown with connection draining, and a bounded catalog cache.</Text>
<DiffViewer file="src/server.ts" language="typescript" editableSide="none" before="import express from "express";
import type { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";

import { InventoryStore } from "./inventory-store.js";
import { PricingClient } from "./pricing-client.js";

const DEFAULT_PORT = 8080;
const DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 25;
const MAX_PAGE_SIZE = 100;
const CACHE_TTL_MS = 30_000;

const HTTP_STATUS = {
  OK: 200,
  CREATED: 201,
  BAD_REQUEST: 400,
  NOT_FOUND: 404,
  CONFLICT: 409,
  INTERNAL: 500,
} as const;

type CatalogItem = {
  id: string;
  sku: string;
  name: string;
  quantity: number;
  priceCents: number;
};

type CachedCatalogPage = {
  items: CatalogItem[];
  expiresAt: number;
};

const catalogCache = new Map<string, CachedCatalogPage>();

const inventory = new InventoryStore();
const pricing = new PricingClient();

function readPort(): number {
  const rawPort = process.env.PORT;
  if (!rawPort) {
    return DEFAULT_PORT;
  }
  const parsedPort = Number.parseInt(rawPort, 10);
  if (Number.isNaN(parsedPort)) {
    return DEFAULT_PORT;
  }
  return parsedPort;
}

function clampPageSize(rawPageSize: string | undefined): number {
  if (!rawPageSize) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  const parsedPageSize = Number.parseInt(rawPageSize, 10);
  if (Number.isNaN(parsedPageSize)) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  if (parsedPageSize > MAX_PAGE_SIZE) {
    return MAX_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  if (parsedPageSize < 1) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  return parsedPageSize;
}

function buildCacheKey(cursor: string, pageSize: number): string {
  return `${cursor}:${pageSize}`;
}

function readFreshCatalogPage(cacheKey: string): CatalogItem[] | null {
  const cached = catalogCache.get(cacheKey);
  if (!cached) {
    return null;
  }
  const isExpired = cached.expiresAt < Date.now();
  if (isExpired) {
    catalogCache.delete(cacheKey);
    return null;
  }
  return cached.items;
}

function writeCatalogPage(cacheKey: string, items: CatalogItem[]): void {
  catalogCache.set(cacheKey, { items, expiresAt: Date.now() + CACHE_TTL_MS });
}

function attachRequestId(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const incomingId = req.header("x-request-id");
  const requestId = incomingId ?? randomUUID();
  res.locals.requestId = requestId;
  res.setHeader("x-request-id", requestId);
  next();
}

function logRequest(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const startedAt = Date.now();
  res.on("finish", () => {
    const durationMs = Date.now() - startedAt;
    console.log(
      `${req.method} ${req.originalUrl} ${res.statusCode} ${durationMs}ms id=${res.locals.requestId}`,
    );
  });
  next();
}

function isValidSku(sku: unknown): sku is string {
  if (typeof sku !== "string") {
    return false;
  }
  return /^[A-Z]{3}-\d{4}$/.test(sku);
}

function isValidQuantity(quantity: unknown): quantity is number {
  if (typeof quantity !== "number") {
    return false;
  }
  if (!Number.isInteger(quantity)) {
    return false;
  }
  return quantity >= 0;
}

const app = express();

app.use(express.json({ limit: "512kb" }));
app.use(attachRequestId);
app.use(logRequest);

app.get("/healthz", (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ status: "ok" });
});

app.get("/catalog", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const cursor = typeof req.query.cursor === "string" ? req.query.cursor : "";
  const pageSize = clampPageSize(
    typeof req.query.pageSize === "string" ? req.query.pageSize : undefined,
  );
  const cacheKey = buildCacheKey(cursor, pageSize);

  const cachedItems = readFreshCatalogPage(cacheKey);
  if (cachedItems) {
    res.setHeader("x-cache", "hit");
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ items: cachedItems });
    return;
  }

  const page = await inventory.listItems({ cursor, pageSize });
  const pricedItems = await pricing.applyPrices(page.items);

  writeCatalogPage(cacheKey, pricedItems);
  res.setHeader("x-cache", "miss");
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ items: pricedItems, nextCursor: page.nextCursor });
});

app.get("/catalog/:itemId", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  const [pricedItem] = await pricing.applyPrices([item]);
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ item: pricedItem });
});

app.post("/catalog", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { sku, name, quantity } = req.body;

  if (!isValidSku(sku)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_sku" });
    return;
  }
  if (typeof name !== "string" || name.length === 0) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_name" });
    return;
  }
  if (!isValidQuantity(quantity)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_quantity" });
    return;
  }

  const existingItem = await inventory.findItemBySku(sku);
  if (existingItem) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT).json({ error: "sku_already_exists" });
    return;
  }

  const createdItem = await inventory.createItem({ sku, name, quantity });
  catalogCache.clear();
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CREATED).json({ item: createdItem });
});

app.post("/catalog/:itemId/reserve", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { quantity } = req.body;
  if (!isValidQuantity(quantity)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_quantity" });
    return;
  }

  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  if (item.quantity < quantity) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT).json({ error: "insufficient_stock" });
    return;
  }

  const reservation = await inventory.reserve(item.id, quantity);
  catalogCache.clear();
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CREATED).json({ reservation });
});

app.delete("/catalog/:itemId", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  await inventory.deleteItem(item.id);
  catalogCache.clear();
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ deleted: item.id });
});

function handleUnknownRoute(_req: Request, res: Response): void {
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "route_not_found" });
}

function handleError(
  error: unknown,
  _req: Request,
  res: Response,
  _next: NextFunction,
): void {
  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "unknown_error";
  console.error(`unhandled error id=${res.locals.requestId}: ${message}`);
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL).json({ error: "internal_error" });
}

app.use(handleUnknownRoute);
app.use(handleError);

const port = readPort();

const server = app.listen(port, () => {
  console.log(`inventory service listening on port ${port}`);
});

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  console.log("received SIGINT, exiting");
  server.close();
  process.exit(0);
});

export { app, server };
" after="import express from "express";
import type { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import type { Server } from "node:http";
import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";

import { InventoryStore } from "./inventory-store.js";
import { PricingClient } from "./pricing-client.js";

const DEFAULT_PORT = 8080;
const DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 25;
const MAX_PAGE_SIZE = 100;
const REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000;
const SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS = 10_000;

const HTTP_STATUS = {
  OK: 200,
  CREATED: 201,
  BAD_REQUEST: 400,
  NOT_FOUND: 404,
  CONFLICT: 409,
  INTERNAL: 500,
  SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: 503,
  GATEWAY_TIMEOUT: 504,
} as const;

const CACHE_POLICY = {
  ttlMs: 30_000,
  maxEntries: 256,
} as const;

const LOG_LEVEL = {
  INFO: "info",
  WARN: "warn",
  ERROR: "error",
} as const;

const SHUTDOWN_SIGNAL = {
  SIGINT: "SIGINT",
  SIGTERM: "SIGTERM",
} as const;

type LogLevel = (typeof LOG_LEVEL)[keyof typeof LOG_LEVEL];
type ShutdownSignal = (typeof SHUTDOWN_SIGNAL)[keyof typeof SHUTDOWN_SIGNAL];
type LogFields = Record<string, string | number | boolean>;

type CatalogItem = {
  id: string;
  sku: string;
  name: string;
  quantity: number;
  priceCents: number;
};

type CachedCatalogPage = {
  items: CatalogItem[];
  expiresAt: number;
};

const catalogCache = new Map<string, CachedCatalogPage>();

const inventory = new InventoryStore();
const pricing = new PricingClient();

let isDraining = false;

function emitLog(level: LogLevel, message: string, fields: LogFields): void {
  const entry = { ts: new Date().toISOString(), level, message, ...fields };
  process.stdout.write(`${JSON.stringify(entry)}\n`);
}

function readPort(): number {
  const rawPort = process.env.PORT;
  if (!rawPort) {
    return DEFAULT_PORT;
  }
  const parsedPort = Number.parseInt(rawPort, 10);
  if (Number.isNaN(parsedPort)) {
    return DEFAULT_PORT;
  }
  return parsedPort;
}

function clampPageSize(rawPageSize: string | undefined): number {
  if (!rawPageSize) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  const parsedPageSize = Number.parseInt(rawPageSize, 10);
  if (Number.isNaN(parsedPageSize)) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  if (parsedPageSize > MAX_PAGE_SIZE) {
    return MAX_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  if (parsedPageSize < 1) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  return parsedPageSize;
}

function buildCacheKey(cursor: string, pageSize: number): string {
  return `${cursor}:${pageSize}`;
}

function readFreshCatalogPage(cacheKey: string): CatalogItem[] | null {
  const cached = catalogCache.get(cacheKey);
  if (!cached) {
    return null;
  }
  const isExpired = cached.expiresAt < Date.now();
  if (isExpired) {
    catalogCache.delete(cacheKey);
    return null;
  }
  return cached.items;
}

function evictOldestPageWhenFull(): void {
  const isUnderLimit = catalogCache.size < CACHE_POLICY.maxEntries;
  if (isUnderLimit) {
    return;
  }
  const [oldestKey] = catalogCache.keys();
  if (!oldestKey) {
    return;
  }
  catalogCache.delete(oldestKey);
}

function writeCatalogPage(cacheKey: string, items: CatalogItem[]): void {
  evictOldestPageWhenFull();
  catalogCache.set(cacheKey, { items, expiresAt: Date.now() + CACHE_POLICY.ttlMs });
}

function attachRequestId(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const incomingId = req.header("x-request-id");
  const requestId = incomingId ?? randomUUID();
  res.locals.requestId = requestId;
  res.setHeader("x-request-id", requestId);
  next();
}

function logRequest(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const startedAt = Date.now();
  res.on("finish", () => {
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "request_completed", {
      method: req.method,
      path: req.originalUrl,
      status: res.statusCode,
      durationMs: Date.now() - startedAt,
      requestId: String(res.locals.requestId),
    });
  });
  next();
}

function enforceRequestTimeout(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
    if (res.headersSent) {
      return;
    }
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.WARN, "request_timed_out", {
      method: req.method,
      path: req.originalUrl,
      timeoutMs: REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS,
      requestId: String(res.locals.requestId),
    });
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.GATEWAY_TIMEOUT).json({ error: "request_timeout" });
  }, REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);

  res.on("close", () => clearTimeout(timeout));
  next();
}

function rejectWhileDraining(_req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  if (!isDraining) {
    next();
    return;
  }
  res.setHeader("connection", "close");
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE).json({ error: "server_shutting_down" });
}

function isValidSku(sku: unknown): sku is string {
  if (typeof sku !== "string") {
    return false;
  }
  return /^[A-Z]{3}-\d{4}$/.test(sku);
}

function isValidQuantity(quantity: unknown): quantity is number {
  if (typeof quantity !== "number") {
    return false;
  }
  if (!Number.isInteger(quantity)) {
    return false;
  }
  return quantity >= 0;
}

const app = express();

app.use(express.json({ limit: "512kb" }));
app.use(attachRequestId);
app.use(rejectWhileDraining);
app.use(enforceRequestTimeout);
app.use(logRequest);

app.get("/healthz", (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
  if (isDraining) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE).json({ status: "draining" });
    return;
  }
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ status: "ok" });
});

app.get("/catalog", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const cursor = typeof req.query.cursor === "string" ? req.query.cursor : "";
  const pageSize = clampPageSize(
    typeof req.query.pageSize === "string" ? req.query.pageSize : undefined,
  );
  const cacheKey = buildCacheKey(cursor, pageSize);

  const cachedItems = readFreshCatalogPage(cacheKey);
  if (cachedItems) {
    res.setHeader("x-cache", "hit");
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ items: cachedItems });
    return;
  }

  const page = await inventory.listItems({ cursor, pageSize });
  const pricedItems = await pricing.applyPrices(page.items);

  writeCatalogPage(cacheKey, pricedItems);
  res.setHeader("x-cache", "miss");
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ items: pricedItems, nextCursor: page.nextCursor });
});

app.get("/catalog/:itemId", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  const [pricedItem] = await pricing.applyPrices([item]);
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ item: pricedItem });
});

app.post("/catalog", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { sku, name, quantity } = req.body;

  if (!isValidSku(sku)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_sku" });
    return;
  }
  if (typeof name !== "string" || name.length === 0) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_name" });
    return;
  }
  if (!isValidQuantity(quantity)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_quantity" });
    return;
  }

  const existingItem = await inventory.findItemBySku(sku);
  if (existingItem) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT).json({ error: "sku_already_exists" });
    return;
  }

  const createdItem = await inventory.createItem({ sku, name, quantity });
  catalogCache.clear();
  emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "item_created", { sku, itemId: createdItem.id });
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CREATED).json({ item: createdItem });
});

app.post("/catalog/:itemId/reserve", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { quantity } = req.body;
  if (!isValidQuantity(quantity)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_quantity" });
    return;
  }

  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  if (item.quantity < quantity) {
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.WARN, "reservation_rejected", {
      itemId: item.id,
      requested: quantity,
      available: item.quantity,
    });
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT).json({ error: "insufficient_stock" });
    return;
  }

  const reservation = await inventory.reserve(item.id, quantity);
  catalogCache.clear();
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CREATED).json({ reservation });
});

function handleUnknownRoute(_req: Request, res: Response): void {
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "route_not_found" });
}

function handleError(
  error: unknown,
  _req: Request,
  res: Response,
  _next: NextFunction,
): void {
  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "unknown_error";
  emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.ERROR, "unhandled_error", {
    reason: message,
    requestId: String(res.locals.requestId),
  });
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL).json({ error: "internal_error" });
}

app.use(handleUnknownRoute);
app.use(handleError);

function beginGracefulShutdown(httpServer: Server, signal: ShutdownSignal): void {
  if (isDraining) {
    return;
  }
  isDraining = true;
  emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "shutdown_started", { signal, graceMs: SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS });

  // Idle keep-alive sockets never close on their own, so the grace timer is what
  // guarantees the process exits instead of hanging on them.
  const forceExit = setTimeout(() => {
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.ERROR, "shutdown_forced", { graceMs: SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS });
    httpServer.closeAllConnections();
    process.exit(1);
  }, SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS);

  httpServer.close(() => {
    clearTimeout(forceExit);
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "shutdown_completed", { signal });
    process.exit(0);
  });
}

function registerShutdownHandlers(httpServer: Server): void {
  for (const signal of Object.values(SHUTDOWN_SIGNAL)) {
    process.on(signal, () => beginGracefulShutdown(httpServer, signal));
  }
}

const port = readPort();

const server = app.listen(port, () => {
  emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "server_listening", { port, timeoutMs: REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS });
});

registerShutdownHandlers(server);

export { app, server };
" />
</section>

    return;
  }
  if (typeof name !== "string" || name.length === 0) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_name" });
    return;
  }
  if (!isValidQuantity(quantity)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_quantity" });
    return;
  }

  const existingItem = await inventory.findItemBySku(sku);
  if (existingItem) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT).json({ error: "sku_already_exists" });
    return;
  }

  const createdItem = await inventory.createItem({ sku, name, quantity });
  catalogCache.clear();
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CREATED).json({ item: createdItem });
});

app.post("/catalog/:itemId/reserve", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { quantity } = req.body;
  if (!isValidQuantity(quantity)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_quantity" });
    return;
  }

  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  if (item.quantity < quantity) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT).json({ error: "insufficient_stock" });
    return;
  }

  const reservation = await inventory.reserve(item.id, quantity);
  catalogCache.clear();
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CREATED).json({ reservation });
});

app.delete("/catalog/:itemId", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  await inventory.deleteItem(item.id);
  catalogCache.clear();
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ deleted: item.id });
});

function handleUnknownRoute(_req: Request, res: Response): void {
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "route_not_found" });
}

function handleError(
  error: unknown,
  _req: Request,
  res: Response,
  _next: NextFunction,
): void {
  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "unknown_error";
  console.error(`unhandled error id=${res.locals.requestId}: ${message}`);
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL).json({ error: "internal_error" });
}

app.use(handleUnknownRoute);
app.use(handleError);

const port = readPort();

const server = app.listen(port, () => {
  console.log(`inventory service listening on port ${port}`);
});

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  console.log("received SIGINT, exiting");
  server.close();
  process.exit(0);
});

export { app, server };
" after="import express from "express";
import type { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import type { Server } from "node:http";
import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";

import { InventoryStore } from "./inventory-store.js";
import { PricingClient } from "./pricing-client.js";

const DEFAULT_PORT = 8080;
const DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE = 25;
const MAX_PAGE_SIZE = 100;
const REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS = 15_000;
const SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS = 10_000;

const HTTP_STATUS = {
  OK: 200,
  CREATED: 201,
  BAD_REQUEST: 400,
  NOT_FOUND: 404,
  CONFLICT: 409,
  INTERNAL: 500,
  SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: 503,
  GATEWAY_TIMEOUT: 504,
} as const;

const CACHE_POLICY = {
  ttlMs: 30_000,
  maxEntries: 256,
} as const;

const LOG_LEVEL = {
  INFO: "info",
  WARN: "warn",
  ERROR: "error",
} as const;

const SHUTDOWN_SIGNAL = {
  SIGINT: "SIGINT",
  SIGTERM: "SIGTERM",
} as const;

type LogLevel = (typeof LOG_LEVEL)[keyof typeof LOG_LEVEL];
type ShutdownSignal = (typeof SHUTDOWN_SIGNAL)[keyof typeof SHUTDOWN_SIGNAL];
type LogFields = Record<string, string | number | boolean>;

type CatalogItem = {
  id: string;
  sku: string;
  name: string;
  quantity: number;
  priceCents: number;
};

type CachedCatalogPage = {
  items: CatalogItem[];
  expiresAt: number;
};

const catalogCache = new Map<string, CachedCatalogPage>();

const inventory = new InventoryStore();
const pricing = new PricingClient();

let isDraining = false;

function emitLog(level: LogLevel, message: string, fields: LogFields): void {
  const entry = { ts: new Date().toISOString(), level, message, ...fields };
  process.stdout.write(`${JSON.stringify(entry)}\n`);
}

function readPort(): number {
  const rawPort = process.env.PORT;
  if (!rawPort) {
    return DEFAULT_PORT;
  }
  const parsedPort = Number.parseInt(rawPort, 10);
  if (Number.isNaN(parsedPort)) {
    return DEFAULT_PORT;
  }
  return parsedPort;
}

function clampPageSize(rawPageSize: string | undefined): number {
  if (!rawPageSize) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  const parsedPageSize = Number.parseInt(rawPageSize, 10);
  if (Number.isNaN(parsedPageSize)) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  if (parsedPageSize > MAX_PAGE_SIZE) {
    return MAX_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  if (parsedPageSize < 1) {
    return DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE;
  }
  return parsedPageSize;
}

function buildCacheKey(cursor: string, pageSize: number): string {
  return `${cursor}:${pageSize}`;
}

function readFreshCatalogPage(cacheKey: string): CatalogItem[] | null {
  const cached = catalogCache.get(cacheKey);
  if (!cached) {
    return null;
  }
  const isExpired = cached.expiresAt < Date.now();
  if (isExpired) {
    catalogCache.delete(cacheKey);
    return null;
  }
  return cached.items;
}

function evictOldestPageWhenFull(): void {
  const isUnderLimit = catalogCache.size < CACHE_POLICY.maxEntries;
  if (isUnderLimit) {
    return;
  }
  const [oldestKey] = catalogCache.keys();
  if (!oldestKey) {
    return;
  }
  catalogCache.delete(oldestKey);
}

function writeCatalogPage(cacheKey: string, items: CatalogItem[]): void {
  evictOldestPageWhenFull();
  catalogCache.set(cacheKey, { items, expiresAt: Date.now() + CACHE_POLICY.ttlMs });
}

function attachRequestId(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const incomingId = req.header("x-request-id");
  const requestId = incomingId ?? randomUUID();
  res.locals.requestId = requestId;
  res.setHeader("x-request-id", requestId);
  next();
}

function logRequest(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const startedAt = Date.now();
  res.on("finish", () => {
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "request_completed", {
      method: req.method,
      path: req.originalUrl,
      status: res.statusCode,
      durationMs: Date.now() - startedAt,
      requestId: String(res.locals.requestId),
    });
  });
  next();
}

function enforceRequestTimeout(req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
    if (res.headersSent) {
      return;
    }
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.WARN, "request_timed_out", {
      method: req.method,
      path: req.originalUrl,
      timeoutMs: REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS,
      requestId: String(res.locals.requestId),
    });
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.GATEWAY_TIMEOUT).json({ error: "request_timeout" });
  }, REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS);

  res.on("close", () => clearTimeout(timeout));
  next();
}

function rejectWhileDraining(_req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
  if (!isDraining) {
    next();
    return;
  }
  res.setHeader("connection", "close");
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE).json({ error: "server_shutting_down" });
}

function isValidSku(sku: unknown): sku is string {
  if (typeof sku !== "string") {
    return false;
  }
  return /^[A-Z]{3}-\d{4}$/.test(sku);
}

function isValidQuantity(quantity: unknown): quantity is number {
  if (typeof quantity !== "number") {
    return false;
  }
  if (!Number.isInteger(quantity)) {
    return false;
  }
  return quantity >= 0;
}

const app = express();

app.use(express.json({ limit: "512kb" }));
app.use(attachRequestId);
app.use(rejectWhileDraining);
app.use(enforceRequestTimeout);
app.use(logRequest);

app.get("/healthz", (_req: Request, res: Response) => {
  if (isDraining) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE).json({ status: "draining" });
    return;
  }
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ status: "ok" });
});

app.get("/catalog", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const cursor = typeof req.query.cursor === "string" ? req.query.cursor : "";
  const pageSize = clampPageSize(
    typeof req.query.pageSize === "string" ? req.query.pageSize : undefined,
  );
  const cacheKey = buildCacheKey(cursor, pageSize);

  const cachedItems = readFreshCatalogPage(cacheKey);
  if (cachedItems) {
    res.setHeader("x-cache", "hit");
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ items: cachedItems });
    return;
  }

  const page = await inventory.listItems({ cursor, pageSize });
  const pricedItems = await pricing.applyPrices(page.items);

  writeCatalogPage(cacheKey, pricedItems);
  res.setHeader("x-cache", "miss");
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ items: pricedItems, nextCursor: page.nextCursor });
});

app.get("/catalog/:itemId", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  const [pricedItem] = await pricing.applyPrices([item]);
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.OK).json({ item: pricedItem });
});

app.post("/catalog", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { sku, name, quantity } = req.body;

  if (!isValidSku(sku)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_sku" });
    return;
  }
  if (typeof name !== "string" || name.length === 0) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_name" });
    return;
  }
  if (!isValidQuantity(quantity)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_quantity" });
    return;
  }

  const existingItem = await inventory.findItemBySku(sku);
  if (existingItem) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT).json({ error: "sku_already_exists" });
    return;
  }

  const createdItem = await inventory.createItem({ sku, name, quantity });
  catalogCache.clear();
  emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "item_created", { sku, itemId: createdItem.id });
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CREATED).json({ item: createdItem });
});

app.post("/catalog/:itemId/reserve", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  const { quantity } = req.body;
  if (!isValidQuantity(quantity)) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.BAD_REQUEST).json({ error: "invalid_quantity" });
    return;
  }

  const item = await inventory.findItem(req.params.itemId);
  if (!item) {
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "item_not_found" });
    return;
  }
  if (item.quantity < quantity) {
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.WARN, "reservation_rejected", {
      itemId: item.id,
      requested: quantity,
      available: item.quantity,
    });
    res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CONFLICT).json({ error: "insufficient_stock" });
    return;
  }

  const reservation = await inventory.reserve(item.id, quantity);
  catalogCache.clear();
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.CREATED).json({ reservation });
});

function handleUnknownRoute(_req: Request, res: Response): void {
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.NOT_FOUND).json({ error: "route_not_found" });
}

function handleError(
  error: unknown,
  _req: Request,
  res: Response,
  _next: NextFunction,
): void {
  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "unknown_error";
  emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.ERROR, "unhandled_error", {
    reason: message,
    requestId: String(res.locals.requestId),
  });
  res.status(HTTP_STATUS.INTERNAL).json({ error: "internal_error" });
}

app.use(handleUnknownRoute);
app.use(handleError);

function beginGracefulShutdown(httpServer: Server, signal: ShutdownSignal): void {
  if (isDraining) {
    return;
  }
  isDraining = true;
  emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "shutdown_started", { signal, graceMs: SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS });

  // Idle keep-alive sockets never close on their own, so the grace timer is what
  // guarantees the process exits instead of hanging on them.
  const forceExit = setTimeout(() => {
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.ERROR, "shutdown_forced", { graceMs: SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS });
    httpServer.closeAllConnections();
    process.exit(1);
  }, SHUTDOWN_GRACE_MS);

  httpServer.close(() => {
    clearTimeout(forceExit);
    emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "shutdown_completed", { signal });
    process.exit(0);
  });
}

function registerShutdownHandlers(httpServer: Server): void {
  for (const signal of Object.values(SHUTDOWN_SIGNAL)) {
    process.on(signal, () => beginGracefulShutdown(httpServer, signal));
  }
}

const port = readPort();

const server = app.listen(port, () => {
  emitLog(LOG_LEVEL.INFO, "server_listening", { port, timeoutMs: REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS });
});

registerShutdownHandlers(server);

export { app, server };
